questions: wind energy ki environment er jonno bhalo?
answers: Wind energy converts the kinetic energy of wind into electricity using wind turbines. It's one of the fastest-growing renewable energy sources worldwide.
Wind energy holo batash er shakti diye electricity banano. Wind turbine er blade ghure generator cholaye — completely clean energy.
Wind turbines capture wind to spin blades connected to a generator. Modern wind farms can power thousands of homes and produce zero emissions during operation.
Wind power is a clean, renewable energy source. Both onshore and offshore wind farms are expanding rapidly, and wind energy costs have dropped significantly in recent years.
